PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if ($env:TOOL_NAME -eq 'run_in_terminal' -and $env:TOOL_INPUT -match 'git commit') { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Run @deterministic lint check before committing\"}}' } else { Write-Output '{\"continue\":true}' }"
